span.p: STOP NOW

span.p: protected by

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: optional

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: resume

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: always on

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: How it works:

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 16px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
💾 SESSION SAVED IN TMUX
Work keeps running
Even if you lose internet
Even if computer crashes

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 16px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📱 RECONNECT FROM ANYWHERE
SSH from your phone
Mosh for bad connections
Pick up where you left off

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 16px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
✅ WORK RESUMES AUTOMATICALLY
AI continues working
Nothing was lost
Seamless experience

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 🛡️ BUILT-IN PROTECTIONS (Always Active)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: ⚠️ Dangerous Command Blocks

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 15px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
/ar:no rm - Block delete commands
/ar:no git reset - Block destructive git
/ar:ok - Allow specific command
/ar:clear - Remove all blocks

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: 📄 File Protection

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 15px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: When AI tries to create files...

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 15px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🔒 Blocks if policy says 'edit only'
✅ Allows if policy says 'allow all'
⚠️ Asks for reason if policy says 'ask first'

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: Pick your approach:

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 16px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
⚡ /ar:go your task here
🤖 AI works alone
🤖 Fewer interruptions
🤖 Best for: clear tasks
Example: /ar:go Add login form

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 16px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🔍 /ar:gp your task here
📋 Structured process
📋 Quality checks
📋 Best for: complex tasks
Example: /ar:gp Build API with tests

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 16px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📝 PLAN FIRST (for big tasks)
(/ar:pn - Create plan
/ar:pr - Improve plan
/ar:pu - Update plan
/ar:pp - Execute plan)
Best for: Multi-step projects

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: Choose when to change:

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 16px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
✅ /ar:a - ALLOW ALL
🆕 New projects
🆕 Prototyping
🆕 Starting from scratch

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 16px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
⚠️ /ar:j - ASK FIRST
🔒 AI explains why
🔒 Before creating files
🔒 Balanced approach

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 16px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🔒 /ar:f - EDIT ONLY
🚫 NO new files
🚫 Refactoring existing code
🚫 Bug fixes only

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 16px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 📊 /ar:st - SHOW CURRENT SETTING

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 20px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
💿 STEP 1
INSTALL AUTORUN
(one-time setup)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 16px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: /plugin install autorun

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 13px !important; font-style: italic !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: 📌 Adds plugin to Claude Code

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 20px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📁 STEP 2
CONTROL FILE CREATION
(default: AI can create any file)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 13px !important; font-style: italic !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
💡 CHANGE ANYTIME
Start: /ar:a (create freely)
Refactor: /ar:f (edit only)
Add features: /ar:a (create again)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 20px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
🚀 STEP 3
START YOUR TASK

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 18px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🤖 STEP 4
AI WORKS AUTONOMOUSLY
(You can step away!)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 18px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🔄 THREE-STAGE LOOP
1️⃣ IMPLEMENT - Build it
2️⃣ EVALUATE - Check quality
3️⃣ VERIFY - Confirm it works
🔄 Loops until task is complete
✅ Then stops automatically

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 13px !important; font-style: italic !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📌 Example flow:
AI creates login form → Checks it →
Finds missing validation → Improves it →
Checks again → Verifies tests pass → Done!

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 20px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🎮 STEP 5
WATCH & CONTROL
(while AI works - optional)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 16px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
👀 /ar:tabs
📊 See all AI sessions
📊 What each is doing
📊 Send commands
Example: Monitor 3 sessions
building different parts

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 16px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
🖥️ /ar:tm
+ Create workspace
+ List sessions
+ Clean up old
Use: Isolated test env

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 16px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
🛑 /ar:x - STOP POLITELY
AI finishes current
Then stops

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 16px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🚨 /ar:sos - EMERGENCY STOP
⚠️ STOPS NOW
⚠️ Doesn't wait

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 16px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
🕸️ STEP 6
CRASH RECOVERY
(if you disconnect)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 18px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
✅ TASK COMPLETE!
🎉 AI did the work
🎉 Files created/modified
🎉 Review the results
